title: Migrate core banking API from REST v2 to v3
outcome_notes: Completed within window. Minor latency spike (12ms) during cutover resolved in 5 minutes.

title: Upgrade PostgreSQL cluster from 14 to 16
outcome_notes: Executed blue-green cutover. Zero downtime. Post-migration query performance improved 18%.

title: Deploy new fraud detection ML model v2.4
outcome_notes: Canary deployment over 4 hours. False positive rate dropped from 2.1% to 1.4%.

title: Migrate payment gateway from on-prem to AWS EC2
outcome_notes: TLS certificate chain issue caused 502 errors at 03:15. Rolled back to on-prem at 03:42. Root cause: intermediate cert not included in ELB config.

title: Patch OpenSSL CVE-2025-1234 across all production hosts
outcome_notes: Rolling patch applied to 48 hosts over 3 hours. No service interruption.

title: Enable MFA enforcement for internal admin portal
outcome_notes: Phased rollout by department. 3 support tickets from users who had not enrolled. Resolved same day.

title: Replace Kafka cluster with AWS MSK
outcome_notes: Consumer group rebalancing caused 22-minute message processing delay. P2 incident declared. No data loss but SLA breach on notification delivery.

title: Deploy containerized auth service to EKS
outcome_notes: Blue-green deployment. Health checks passed. Auth latency reduced from 120ms to 45ms.

title: Add PCI DSS audit logging to payment endpoints
outcome_notes: No functional changes to payment flow. Log volume increased 40% — pre-provisioned storage handled it.

title: Migrate customer data to encrypted-at-rest S3 buckets
outcome_notes: Migrated 2.4TB over weekend window. Verified checksums on 100% of objects. Reporting queries unaffected.

title: Upgrade Kubernetes cluster from 1.27 to 1.29
outcome_notes: Node-by-node rolling upgrade. Two pods failed liveness checks due to deprecated API calls — patched and redeployed.

title: Deploy real-time wire transfer monitoring
outcome_notes: Feature flag enabled for 10% traffic, then ramped to 100% over 2 hours. Caught 3 suspicious transfers in first week.

title: Database schema migration for SWIFT ISO 20022
outcome_notes: Migration script timed out on transactions table (890M rows). Rolled back at 04:30. Re-planned with batched migration approach.

title: Enable WAF rules for public-facing APIs
outcome_notes: Deployed in monitor-only mode for 1 week, then switched to block mode. Blocked 1,200 malicious requests in first 24 hours.

title: Migrate CI/CD pipeline from Jenkins to GitHub Actions
outcome_notes: Parallel run for 2 weeks. Build times reduced 35%. All teams migrated by EOW.

title: Replace legacy ACH batch processor with real-time engine
outcome_notes: Race condition in dual-write mode caused 14 duplicate settlements totaling $23K. P1 incident. Manual reversal completed within 4 hours. No customer impact due to T+1 settlement window.

title: Deploy API rate limiting for partner integrations
outcome_notes: Gradual enforcement over 1 week. Two partners exceeded limits — contacted proactively. No service disruption.

title: Upgrade Redis cluster to 7.2 with TLS
outcome_notes: Sentinel-managed failover during upgrade. 800ms blip on session lookups. TLS overhead added 2ms avg latency — within budget.

title: Migrate mobile app push notifications to FCM v2
outcome_notes: Server-side only change. Delivery rate improved from 94% to 98.5%. No client app update required.

title: Emergency patch for Log4j-style RCE in transaction logger
outcome_notes: Emergency CAB approval. Patched 12 services in 90 minutes. WAF virtual patch deployed as interim measure while services restarted.
